data.title: New research by GS1 US shows how 2D barcodes and standards-based systems enhance accuracy, traceability, and collaboration in supply chains.
data.description: A recent VDC research report commissioned by GS1 US has revealed the benefits of utilizing 2D barcodes and standards-based systems in enhancing accuracy, traceability, and collaboration on a large scale. The study, conducted in EWING, N.J. and released on September 25, 2025, demonstrates how intelligent data capture, driven by 2D barcodes, can significantly improve operational efficiencies. This technology has shown to increase accuracy and streamline processes leading to improved traceability and enhanced collaboration among stakeholders. The findings underscore the importance of adopting 2D barcodes and standards-based systems for scalable improvements in various industries.

data.title: HCI announces Exzeo Group, Inc. filing registration statement for proposed IPO; offering details TBD.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on September 25, 2025, HCI Group, Inc. (NYSE:HCI) revealed that its majority held subsidiary, Exzeo Group, Inc., has publicly submitted a registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for the planned initial public offering of Exzeo’s common stock. The specific number of shares to be included in the offering and the price range are yet to be determined. The offering's fruition depends on market conditions, with uncertainties around the completion timeline and the final size or terms of the offering.

data.title: "IL Divo’s Steven LaBrie signs with Intercept Music to launch solo release of 'El Triste.' Baritone singer for multi-platinum IL Divo. Mexico City."
data.description: In Mexico City, Intercept Music has recently signed Steven LaBrie, a baritone singer known for his work with IL Divo, a popular classical crossover Latin quartet with multi-platinum sales.

data.title: Wrike announces winners of Elite 100 Awards, honoring customers for excellence in work management. Expanded program includes AI Strategy and Engagement categories. 20 winners this year.
data.description: Wrike, the intelligent work management platform based in San Diego, recently revealed the awardees of its second annual Wrike Elite 100 Awards. These awards recognize customers who demonstrate exceptional skill in utilizing Wrike to drive innovation, foster collaboration, and achieve tangible results within their companies. The latest edition of the awards program introduced two additional categories, AI Strategy and Engagement, showcasing Wrike's emphasis on artificial intelligence and visual cooperation. This year’s program honored 20 outstanding winners.
Xiaomi Has Supplied Over 40,000 Yu7 Cars Since Launch in Mid-2025

data.title: Q/C Technologies, formerly TNF Pharmaceuticals, now trades as QCLS on Nasdaq. Focus on quantum-class computing.
data.description: In New York, Q/C Technologies, Inc. (formerly TNF Pharmaceuticals, Inc.) (Nasdaq: QCLS) disclosed that its common stock will now trade under the ticker symbol “QCLS” as of today. The company's shift towards quantum-class computing is highlighted by its new name, Q/C Technologies. This change follows its acquisition of exclusive global rights to LightSolver’s light-speed laser processing unit. This unit, known as the LPU, marks the first of its kind in the world.

data.title: New SAS Retrieval Agent Manager utilizes AI to analyze unstructured data, addressing 80% of enterprise data. Data grows 50-60% annually.
data.description: In Cary, North Carolina on September 25, 2025, it was reported that over 80% of enterprise data is currently found in unstructured forms like text and images. This vast amount of data is observed to be increasing at a rate of 50% to 60% each year. The emphasis is on the importance of converting this unstructured data into actionable insights promptly to facilitate better business decision-making processes.

data.title: CobbleStone Software to showcase contract management innovation at 2025 ACC Annual Meeting in Philadelphia.
data.description: In Philadelphia, CobbleStone Software will be exhibiting its AI-driven contract management tools and engaging with legal experts at the 2025 ACC Annual Meeting and ACC Greater Philadelphia Chapter Party. The event is set to take place on September 25, 2025. CobbleStone Software, headquartered in Princeton, New Jersey, is known for its innovative solutions in this field.

ELON MUSK’S XAI STRIKES DEAL WITH U.S. GOVERNMENT — GSA TO EXPAND ACCESS TO GROK AI CHATBOT

data.title: Over half of Americans haven't moved in 5 years, but 32% plan to move soon, according to LugLess survey of 1,012 consumers.
data.description: In Denver, the luggage shipping service LugLess released data from its 2025 State of Moving survey featuring responses from 1,012 individuals aged 18 to 65+. The findings illustrate the extreme stress associated with moving, with nearly 10% of participants expressing a preference for an IRS audit over relocating. Shockingly, 10% of respondents admitted they would opt to end their relationship rather than go through another move. These results highlight a widespread aversion to moving among Americans, despite their willingness to relocate.

data.title: Peli BioThermal unveils Vēro One™, a new curbside recyclable dry ice shipper, at LogiPharma US in Boston on Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: In Boston on September 25, 2025, Peli BioThermal, a top company in temperature-controlled packaging solutions, introduced Vēro One™, a new single-use dry ice shipper that is curbside recyclable. This product was revealed at LogiPharma US for the first time.

data.title: GoPro launches GoPro ReFrame plugin for DaVinci Resolve, enhancing 360 video editing capabilities for all users.
data.description: GoPro, based in San Mateo, California, unveiled a new enhancement to its 360 software suite on September 25, 2025. This update introduces advanced editing features targeting both beginners and professionals. The company, listed on NASDAQ as GPRO, launched the public beta of the GoPro ReFrame plugin for DaVinci Resolve. This addition aims to provide users with more sophisticated editing capabilities.

data.title: GK Properties and Signature Real Estate Group merge in Southern Nevada, combining decades of experience, hundreds of agents, and billions in sales to strengthen the market.
data.description: In the bustling city of Las Vegas, GK Properties and Signature Real Estate Group have recently revealed a merger that combines their extensive expertise in the real estate industry. The union of these two prominent brokerages, each with numerous years of experience, hundreds of agents, and a combined sales volume totaling in the billions, marks a significant development in the local market. This collaboration establishes a powerhouse in the region, capable of providing unparalleled support to agents and delivering enhanced benefits to clients. Amidst the ongoing fluctuations in the Southern Nevada housing market, this merger positions the newly formed entity strongly for continued success.

data.title: Eaton chosen by Bell to create aerial refueling probe for U.S. Army's MV-75 FLRAA, marking milestone in collaboration.
data.description: Eaton, an intelligent power management company, has been chosen by Bell Textron Inc. to create and certify the aerial refueling retractable probe for the U.S. Army’s MV-75 Future Long Range Assault Aircraft (FLRAA). This collaboration represents a key advancement in Eaton's partnership with Bell and their innovative vertical lift platform. Aerial refueling, a long-standing expertise of Eaton in aerospace, underscores the company's commitment to advancing aviation technology.
Israeli foreign ministry: At least 7 Flotilla members have published messages in support of terrorist organisations

data.title: Cloud for Good secures investment from Salesforce and appoints Nara Henderson as Chief Revenue Officer, fueling growth.
data.description: Today in Asheville, North Carolina, Cloud for Good, a leading Salesforce implementation partner, revealed two significant updates on September 25, 2025. Firstly, they disclosed an investment from Salesforce. Secondly, Nara Henderson has been appointed as the Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). These milestones mark an important turning point for the company as they continue to grow and expand their operations.

data.title: Keke's Breakfast Cafe introduces limited-time Fall menu on Sept. 25 with options like Pumpkin Spice Stuffed French Toast.
data.description: Beginning on Thursday, September 25th, a new national promotion will be introduced offering a variety of breakfast options such as Autumn Sangria and Pumpkin Spice Stuffed French Toast. This promotion is aimed at providing a warm and comforting start to the day for customers across the country.
